rules.description: Left Control alone (short press) to Hyper A and Control + HJKL/O for Navigation
remap right command to left_control only in VSCode and others - ver 2 with Esc in pressed alone
remap right command to left_control only in VSCode and others
right_command + left_shift + i to right_command + left_shift + a
left_control + g to escape - exclude emacs
right_command + left_shift (jk to arrow keys,g to escape, o to enter) - exclude emacs
Right Command + Delete to Option + Delete
right_command + left_shift + i to right_command + left_shift + a
right_command + left_shift + (jk to arrow keys,g to escape, o to enter) - exclude emacs
right_command + jk to arrow keys Vim
Press left_command + right_command to activate left_command + shift + a & otherwise held_down and use as left_command. Useful for Google Chrome
Press right_command + left_command to activate left_command + shift + a & otherwise held_down and use as left_command. Useful for Google Chrome
left_option + jk to arrow keys Vim
right_command + left_option + jk to arrow keys Vim
Map Tab to Hyper when held
Press twice right_command to escape, otherwise held_down and use as left_command
left_control to Escape on single press alone, Control on press and hold for more than 250 milliseconds or combined with other keys.
right_command to Escape on single press alone, right_command on press and hold for more than 250 milliseconds or combined with other keys.
VSCode Vim: Control + g to Escape
Press twice right_command to activate left_command + shift + a & otherwise held_down and use as left_command. Useful for Google Chrome
Press twice right_shift to activate caps_lock, otherwise held_down use as right_shift
